title: Rochambeau and the Allied Road to Yorktown
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Rochambeau did not come to America to steal the spotlight from George Washington. He came to help win a war. This factual narrative follows the French general, the alliance that changed the Revolution, and the careful march that ended at Yorktown.

chapters.title: A French Soldier for an American War
Yorktown and the Meaning of Alliance
